text.title: Win-Loss Quarterly PM Template Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed across deployments. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Report claims 'we lose to competitor X' based on 3 deals.
antipattern.fix: Defer the report if sample <15 each; combine quarters if needed.

antipattern.symptom: Reps blame 'price'; buyer interviews surface onboarding pain.
antipattern.root-cause: No buyer interviews; rep narrative taken at face value.
antipattern.fix: Conduct ≥5 buyer interviews per quarter (mix won/lost).

antipattern.symptom: Loss reasons logged as 'other' or 'not a fit'; positioning revision blind.
antipattern.fix: Every loss names competitor and buyer-stated reason; opaque losses are re-interviewed.

antipattern.symptom: Report distributed; no roadmap, positioning, or pricing changes follow.
antipattern.root-cause: Report stops at description; no named actions or owners.
antipattern.fix: Mandate 3-7 named actions with owners and due dates at the end.
